mapper.select: SELECT TI.ItemID, TI.CurChangeSet, TI.Identifier, TI.Version, TM.Name + '(' + TM.LoginId + ')' as authorName, TTT.Name as TeamName, STRING_AGG(ISNULL(TDVT.Name, ''), ', ') as dimSite, TCS.Description FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = TI.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT ON TTT.TeamID = TM.TeamID AND TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM TID ON TID.ItemID = TI.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DIM_VALUE_TXT TDVT ON TDVT.DimValueID = TID.DimValueID AND TDVT.DimTypeID = TID.DimTypeID AND TDVT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TCS.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TCS.ChangeSetID = TI.CurChangeSet WHERE TI.ItemID = #{itemID} GROUP BY TI.ItemID, TI.CurChangeSet, TI.Identifier, TI.Version, TM.Name, TM.LoginID, TTT.Name, TCS.Description

SELECT CASE WHEN TD.Name = '명칭' THEN '문서명' ELSE TD.Name END AS Name, TATA.AttrTypeCode, CASE WHEN TAT.DataType = 'MLOV' THEN STRING_AGG(ISNULL(TATL.Value, ''), ', ') WHEN TAT.DataType = 'LOV' THEN MAX(ISNULL(TATL.Value, '')) ELSE MAX(ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, '')) END AS PlainText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_ALLOCATION TATA LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE TAT ON TAT.AttrTypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode AND TD.Category = 'AT' AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.AttrTypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode AND TIA.ClassCode = TATA.ItemClassCode AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA.ItemID = #{itemID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL ON TATL.AttrTypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode AND TATL.LovCode = TIA.LovCode AND TATL.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TCS.ItemID = TIA.ItemID WHERE TATA.ItemClassCode = ( SELECT ClassCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{itemID} ) AND TIA.ItemID IS NOT NULL AND TIA.AttrTypeCode not in ('ZAT01080') -- 채번 attr GROUP BY TD.Name, TATA.AttrTypeCode, TAT.DataType, TATA.SortNum ORDER BY TATA.SortNum

SELECT TF.DocumentID, TD.Name as FileType, TF.FileRealName, TF.FileName, TFL.FilePath, REPLACE(REPLACE(TFL.FilePath, '//', '\'), '/', '\') + FileName AS FileRealPath, TI.Version, TM.Name + '(' + TM.LoginId + ')' as authorName, CONVERT(VARCHAR, TF.CreationTime, 23) AS CreationDate FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TF.DocumentID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TFL ON TFL.FltpCode = TF.FltpCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TF.FltpCode AND TD.Category = 'FLTP' AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = TF.RegMemberID WHERE TF.DocumentID = #{itemID} AND TF.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TF.ChangeSetID = TI.CurChangeSet
SELECT ToItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE FromItemID = #{itemID} AND CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND Deleted != '1'
